name: io.github.laf-rge/quickbooks-mcp
description: MCP server for QuickBooks Online API integration

environmentVariables.name: QBO_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: QuickBooks app Client ID from developer.intuit.com

environmentVariables.name: QBO_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: QuickBooks app Client Secret from developer.intuit.com

environmentVariables.name: QBO_SANDBOX
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to use QuickBooks sandbox environment
